title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2026
summary:
Main
Today, iron ore futures showed a weak trend, with the main contract I2609 closing at 783.5 yuan/ton,down 0.32% from the previous trading session. Spot prices have decreased by 0-2 yuan/ton so far. Traders are actively quoing, while steel mills are mostly purchasing for just-in-time needs; overall spot transactions remain limited.
